name: Chronic Golf + Games
address: 59 New Orleans Rd Building A, Hilton Head Island, SC 29928
about: Chronic Games + Golf is a multi-sport simulation venue located near Hilton Head Island and Bluffton, South Carolina. The facility offers a family-friendly environment with state-of-the-art simulators for various sports, including virtual golf, soccer, football, and zombie dodgeball. It operates as a restaurant and sports bar, providing a mix of entertainment and dining for all ages. The venue features private lounge areas and can accommodate groups of 100+ people, making it suitable for events such as birthday parties, corporate gatherings, and family outings. All software and sports equipment are provided with lounge reservations, which comfortably seat up to 6 people per bay.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art simulators offering Full Swing Golf and e6 software with 150+ virtual courses
All-inclusive pricing that includes software and sports equipment
Variety of sports activities available beyond golf, creating a versatile entertainment experience

food_and_drink.notes: Kid-friendly and adult menu options available

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitor technology available for rent or purchase

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, all sports equipment is provided with your lounge reservation.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue offers an on-site menu with both kid-friendly and adult options, including a full-service bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Gameplay begins immediately at the time of reservation, and guests are required to arrive 15 minutes beforehand to ensure ample playing time.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Chronic Games + Golf offers a kid-friendly environment with games, a kid-approved menu, and a safe space for children to play.
